mapper.sql: SELECT CASE TRIM(tp.PAY_ITEM_CD) WHEN '01' THEN 'TUITION' WHEN '02' THEN 'TEXTBOOK' ELSE 'ETC' END AS cat, tp.PAY_AMT AS amt, tp.PAY_DT AS dt FROM TUITION_PAYMENT tp WHERE TRIM(tp.PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' UNION ALL SELECT CASE oi.PROD_DIV_CD WHEN 'COURSE' THEN 'COURSE' WHEN 'TEXTBOOK' THEN 'TEXTBOOK' ELSE 'ETC' END AS cat, (oi.PROD_PRICE * oi.ITEM_QTY) AS amt, o.REG_DT AS dt FROM ORDERS o JOIN ORDER_ITEM oi ON o.ORD_SN = oi.ORD_SN WHERE o.ORD_STAT_CD = 'PAID'

NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cat = 'TUITION' THEN amt END), 0) AS tuition, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cat = 'COURSE' THEN amt END), 0) AS course, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cat = 'TEXTBOOK' THEN amt END), 0) AS textbook, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cat = 'ETC' THEN amt END), 0) AS etc, NVL(SUM(amt), 0) AS total
mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(dt, 'MM') AS mm,
FROM ( ) WHERE TO_CHAR(dt, 'YYYY') = #{year} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dt, 'MM') ORDER BY mm
mapper.sql: SELECT tp.PAY_DT AS tx_dt, '원비수납' AS source, NVL(ci.COM_CD_NM, '원비') AS category, m.USER_NAME AS purchaser, NVL(cm.COM_CD_NM, '-') AS pay_method, TRIM(tp.PAY_MTHD_CD) AS pay_mthd_cd, tp.PAY_AMT AS amount FROM TUITION_PAYMENT tp JOIN MEMBER m ON tp.USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD ci ON TRIM(ci.CL_CODE) = '222' AND TRIM(ci.COM_CD) = TRIM(tp.PAY_ITEM_CD) LEFT JOIN COM_CD cm ON TRIM(cm.CL_CODE) = '223' AND TRIM(cm.COM_CD) = TRIM(tp.PAY_MTHD_CD) WHERE TRIM(tp.PAY_STAT_CD) = '01' UNION ALL SELECT o.REG_DT AS tx_dt, '온라인결제' AS source, '온라인 판매' AS category, mo.USER_NAME AS purchaser, '온라인' AS pay_method, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR2(10)) AS pay_mthd_cd, o.TOT_AMT AS amount FROM ORDERS o JOIN MEMBER mo ON o.USER_ID = mo.USER_ID WHERE o.ORD_STAT_CD = 'PAID'
mapper.select:
SELECT t.tx_dt, t.source, t.category, t.purchaser, t.pay_method, t.amount FROM ( ) t
ORDER BY t.tx_dt DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
